prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-5INPOCKETKNIFE-MILMEN Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Clip Point Blade Pocket Knife 5 Inch Window Punch Military Men Description: Be prepared for any situation with the ASR Outdoor Clip Point Pocket Knife.

This pocket knife features a spring assisted clip blade constructed of durable 440 stainless steel. The blade itself is 3mm thick so it can be trusted for heavy duty use. The handle has a comfortable ergonomic grip to prevent slippage, and features a majestic Military Men design.

This knife also comes with a window punch and seat belt cutter as an added safety measure. The metal pocket clip will allow you to easily secure the blade while not in use. This is a great every day use tool or gift idea for knife collectors and fanatics. Search Terms: pocket knife for men womens sharpener small mini edc gear knife bacpack hunting knife with sheath damascus folding knife utility karambit tanto camping knife survival tool survival knife with sheath survival tool camping accessories gear essentials Features: - DURABLE 440 Stainless Steel Construction - Will Not Rust - CLIP POINT Pocket Knife Sturdy & Sharp Blade - 5" | 8.75" Overall Length - MILITARY MEN Design Handle with Pocket Clip for Easy Storage When Not In Use - WINDOW PUNCH & SEAT BELT CUTTER For Added Safety - ERGONOMIC Handle with Spring Assist Thumb Button === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5 Inch Military Men Clip Point Pocket Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5 in Clip Point Pocket Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Spring Assisted, 440 Stainless Steel, Window Punch, Seat Belt Cutter, Ergonomic Grip, Pocket Clip

openai.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel Blade, Spring Assist Thumb Button, Window Punch, Seat Belt Cutter, Ergonomic Military Men Grip
